issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios and edge cases such as duplicate emails, password strength, or token expiration handling.

scenarios.name: Implement email/password signup with Lucia and Drizzle
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses DrizzlePostgreSQLAdapter, Argon2id().hash, generateIdFromEntropySize(10), lucia.createSession + createSessionCookie as documented; baseline typically reaches for next-auth or rolls custom bcrypt + JWT, missing the explicit Lucia primitives.

scenarios.name: Add Google OAuth callback that creates or finds a user and starts a session
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses arctic's Google with createAuthorizationURL + validateAuthorizationCode, fetches userinfo via Bearer accessToken(), then lucia.createSession + createSessionCookie; baseline tends to wire google-auth-library or passport, omitting arctic and Lucia's session creation pattern.
